title: Scerra Horn
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Scerra Horn |homeworld=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]''[[I, Jedi]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=[[Horn family]] |parents= |partners=*[[Nejaa Halcyon]] {{C|[[Marriage/Legends|spouse]]}} *[[Rostek Horn]] {{C|spouse}} |siblings= |children=[[Hal Horn]] |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|My grandfather was married to my grandmother.''"
"''Yes, but Corellian Jedi are well…Corellian…|Corran Horn and Luke Skywalker|[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]]}} '''Scerra Horn''' was the wife of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]]. She was the mother of [[Hal Horn|Valin Halcyon]]. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of her first husband and the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], Scerra married her husband's friend [[Rostek Horn]] and had her son's name changed to Valin Horn (nicknamed "Hal"), all in an effort to protect the family from the [[Great Jedi Purge]]. Scerra's grandson—who became a [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] inspector like his father and a Jedi like his biological grandfather—was [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Imo}} *''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Scerra Horn |hu=Scerra Halcyon |pl=Scerra Horn }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Horn, Scerra}} [[Category:Corellians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]]
